assertions.description: U3 (ADM7514, Analog Devices ultra-low noise LDO from the ADM751x family) is present with VIN/VOUT/EN/BYP/REF/REF_SENSE pins and 5 decoupling capacitors. signal_analysis.power_regulators is empty []. The ADM7514 is clearly a linear regulator (pins named VOUT, VIN, EN confirm this). A power_regulator entry with regulator_type='linear', input_rail='+VIN', output_rail='+VOUT' should be generated.
